add-integration-test.description: After writing the integration test, run it and verify it:

tools.name: mcp__plugin_flutter_flutter-ultra-build__start_run_integration_tests
tools.description: Execute the integration test suite

tools.name: mcp__plugin_flutter_flutter-ultra-build__poll_run_integration_tests
tools.description: Monitor integration test progress until completion

tools.name: mcp__plugin_flutter_flutter-ultra-build__get_run_integration_tests_result
tools.description: Get detailed results with per-failure info

tools.name: mcp__plugin_flutter_flutter-ultra-runtime__launch_app
tools.description: Launch the app manually for interactive integration test verification

tools.name: mcp__plugin_flutter_flutter-ultra-runtime__attach
tools.description: Attach to the running app's VM Service

tools.name: mcp__plugin_flutter_flutter-ultra-runtime__screenshot
tools.description: Capture screenshots during test verification

tools.name: mcp__plugin_flutter_flutter-ultra-runtime__get_widget_tree
tools.description: Inspect the widget tree to verify test assertions

add-widget-preview.description: After adding `@Preview` annotations, use these tools to view and capture previews:

tools.name: mcp__plugin_flutter_flutter-ultra-runtime__launch_app
tools.description: Launch the app to render previews

tools.name: mcp__plugin_flutter_flutter-ultra-runtime__screenshot
tools.description: Capture preview screenshots for documentation

tools.name: mcp__plugin_flutter_flutter-ultra-build__analyze
tools.description: Verify preview annotations are syntactically correct

add-widget-test.description: After writing the widget test, run and validate it with these tools:

tools.name: mcp__plugin_flutter_flutter-ultra-build__start_run_widget_tests
tools.description: Execute widget tests (supports `testNamePattern` to scope)

tools.name: mcp__plugin_flutter_flutter-ultra-build__poll_run_widget_tests
tools.description: Monitor test progress until completion

tools.name: mcp__plugin_flutter_flutter-ultra-build__get_run_widget_tests_result
tools.description: Get detailed results: passed, failed, skipped, per-failure info

tools.name: mcp__plugin_flutter_flutter-ultra-build__analyze
tools.description: Static analysis before running tests

apply-architecture-best-practices.description: Use these tools to audit and validate architectural decisions:

tools.name: mcp__plugin_flutter_flutter-ultra-build__list_projects
tools.description: Discover all projects in the workspace

tools.name: mcp__plugin_flutter_flutter-ultra-build__project_info
tools.description: Get project structure, dependencies, and entry points

tools.name: mcp__plugin_flutter_flutter-ultra-build__analyze
tools.description: Run static analysis to catch architectural violations

tools.name: mcp__plugin_flutter_flutter-ultra-build__pub_deps
tools.description: Review dependency graph for layering issues

build-responsive-layout.description: After building the layout, verify responsiveness across breakpoints:

tools.name: mcp__plugin_flutter_flutter-ultra-runtime__audit_responsive
tools.description: Automated responsive audit at multiple viewport sizes

tools.name: mcp__plugin_flutter_flutter-ultra-runtime__screenshot
tools.description: Capture screenshots at each breakpoint

tools.name: mcp__plugin_flutter_flutter-ultra-runtime__find_widget
tools.description: Locate a specific widget to verify it renders correctly at each breakpoint

tools.name: mcp__plugin_flutter_flutter-ultra-runtime__dump_render_tree
tools.description: Inspect render tree for constraint issues

tools.name: mcp__plugin_flutter_flutter-ultra-runtime__get_runtime_errors
tools.description: Check for overflow errors at different sizes

fix-layout-issues.description: Diagnose and verify layout fixes with live app inspection:

tools.name: mcp__plugin_flutter_flutter-ultra-runtime__get_runtime_errors
tools.description: Fetch current runtime errors including RenderFlex overflows

tools.name: mcp__plugin_flutter_flutter-ultra-runtime__dump_render_tree
tools.description: Inspect render tree to see constraint propagation

tools.name: mcp__plugin_flutter_flutter-ultra-runtime__audit_design
tools.description: Run all 10 design checks including layout_overflow and touch_targets

tools.name: mcp__plugin_flutter_flutter-ultra-runtime__audit_responsive
tools.description: Test layout at compact/medium/expanded/large breakpoints

tools.name: mcp__plugin_flutter_flutter-ultra-runtime__find_widget
tools.description: Locate the specific widget causing the layout issue

tools.name: mcp__plugin_flutter_flutter-ultra-runtime__toggle_debug_paint
tools.description: Toggle debug paint to visualize layout boundaries

tools.name: mcp__plugin_flutter_flutter-ultra-runtime__hot_reload
tools.description: Hot reload after applying fix to verify immediately

tools.name: mcp__plugin_flutter_flutter-ultra-runtime__screenshot
tools.description: Capture before/after screenshots of the fix

implement-json-serialization.description: If using code generation (json_serializable), run the build runner:

tools.name: mcp__plugin_flutter_flutter-ultra-build__start_build_runner_build
tools.description: Run build_runner to generate serialization code

tools.name: mcp__plugin_flutter_flutter-ultra-build__poll_build_runner_job
tools.description: Monitor code generation progress

tools.name: mcp__plugin_flutter_flutter-ultra-build__analyze
tools.description: Verify generated code has no analysis errors

setup-declarative-routing.description: After configuring routes, test navigation in the running app:

tools.name: mcp__plugin_flutter_flutter-ultra-runtime__launch_app
tools.description: Launch the app to test routing

tools.name: mcp__plugin_flutter_flutter-ultra-browser__navigate
tools.description: Navigate to specific routes in the browser (web targets)

tools.name: mcp__plugin_flutter_flutter-ultra-runtime__screenshot
tools.description: Capture each route for visual verification

tools.name: mcp__plugin_flutter_flutter-ultra-runtime__get_runtime_errors
tools.description: Check for routing errors (missing routes, redirect loops)

setup-localization.description: Generate and validate localization files with these tools:

tools.name: mcp__plugin_flutter_flutter-ultra-build__flutter_gen_l10n
tools.description: Generate localization Dart code from ARB files

tools.name: mcp__plugin_flutter_flutter-ultra-build__list_missing_translations
tools.description: Find missing translation keys across locales

tools.name: mcp__plugin_flutter_flutter-ultra-build__arb_add_key
tools.description: Add a new translation key to all ARB files

tools.name: mcp__plugin_flutter_flutter-ultra-build__arb_remove_key
tools.description: Remove an obsolete translation key from all ARB files

tools.name: mcp__plugin_flutter_flutter-ultra-build__arb_diff
tools.description: Compare ARB files to find drift between locales

use-http-package.description: Monitor and debug HTTP calls in the running app:

tools.name: mcp__plugin_flutter_flutter-ultra-runtime__start_http_capture
tools.description: Start capturing HTTP traffic

tools.name: mcp__plugin_flutter_flutter-ultra-runtime__get_http_events
tools.description: View captured HTTP requests and responses

tools.name: mcp__plugin_flutter_flutter-ultra-runtime__stop_http_capture
tools.description: Stop HTTP capture

tools.name: mcp__plugin_flutter_flutter-ultra-runtime__get_runtime_errors
tools.description: Check for unhandled HTTP exceptions

add-unit-test.description: After writing the unit test, run and validate it:

tools.name: mcp__plugin_flutter_flutter-ultra-build__test_filter
tools.description: Discover test files matching a name pattern before running

tools.name: mcp__plugin_flutter_flutter-ultra-build__start_run_unit_tests
tools.description: Execute unit tests (supports `testNamePattern` and `coverage`)

tools.name: mcp__plugin_flutter_flutter-ultra-build__poll_run_unit_tests
tools.description: Monitor test progress until completion

tools.name: mcp__plugin_flutter_flutter-ultra-build__get_run_unit_tests_result
tools.description: Get detailed results with per-failure info

build-cli-app.description: Use these tools to validate the CLI app structure:

tools.name: mcp__plugin_flutter_flutter-ultra-build__analyze
tools.description: Static analysis on the CLI project

tools.name: mcp__plugin_flutter_flutter-ultra-build__pub_deps
tools.description: Review dependency tree

collect-coverage.description: Collect coverage directly via the test runner:

tools.name: mcp__plugin_flutter_flutter-ultra-build__start_run_unit_tests
tools.description: Run tests with `coverage: true` to collect LCOV data

tools.name: mcp__plugin_flutter_flutter-ultra-build__get_run_unit_tests_result
tools.description: Get results including coverage report path

fix-runtime-errors.description: Diagnose and fix runtime errors in the live app:

tools.name: mcp__plugin_flutter_flutter-ultra-runtime__get_runtime_errors
tools.description: Fetch active stack traces from the running app

tools.name: mcp__plugin_flutter_flutter-ultra-runtime__get_logs
tools.description: View recent log output for context

tools.name: mcp__plugin_flutter_flutter-ultra-runtime__evaluate
tools.description: Evaluate expressions in the running isolate to inspect live state

tools.name: mcp__plugin_flutter_flutter-ultra-runtime__dump_render_tree
tools.description: Inspect render tree for layout-related runtime errors

tools.name: mcp__plugin_flutter_flutter-ultra-runtime__hot_reload
tools.description: Hot reload after applying fix to verify immediately

tools.name: mcp__plugin_oh-my-claudecode_t__lsp_hover
tools.description: Inspect type and docs of any expression at a given file:line:col (dart_hover)

generate-test-mocks.description: Run build_runner to generate mock classes:

tools.name: mcp__plugin_flutter_flutter-ultra-build__start_build_runner_build
tools.description: Run build_runner to generate *.mocks.dart files

tools.name: mcp__plugin_flutter_flutter-ultra-build__poll_build_runner_job
tools.description: Monitor generation progress

tools.name: mcp__plugin_flutter_flutter-ultra-build__get_build_runner_result
tools.description: Check for generation errors

migrate-to-checks-package.description: Validate the migration with static analysis and tests:

tools.name: mcp__plugin_flutter_flutter-ultra-build__analyze
tools.description: Check for type errors after migration

tools.name: mcp__plugin_flutter_flutter-ultra-build__fix
tools.description: Apply automated fixes for simple migrations

tools.name: mcp__plugin_flutter_flutter-ultra-build__start_run_unit_tests
tools.description: Run tests to verify migration didn't break assertions

tools.name: mcp__plugin_flutter_flutter-ultra-build__pub_get
tools.description: Run pub get to see the current resolution state

tools.name: mcp__plugin_flutter_flutter-ultra-build__pub_deps
tools.description: View the full dependency tree

tools.name: mcp__plugin_flutter_flutter-ultra-build__pub_outdated
tools.description: Check which packages are outdated

tools.name: mcp__plugin_flutter_flutter-ultra-build__pub_upgrade
tools.description: Attempt upgrade to resolve conflicts

run-static-analysis.description: Run analysis and auto-fix via flutter-ultra tools:

tools.name: mcp__plugin_flutter_flutter-ultra-build__analyze
tools.description: Run dart analyze with full diagnostics

tools.name: mcp__plugin_flutter_flutter-ultra-build__fix_preview
tools.description: Preview fixes before applying

tools.name: mcp__plugin_flutter_flutter-ultra-build__fix
tools.description: Apply dart fix --apply for automated lint fixes

tools.name: mcp__plugin_flutter_flutter-ultra-build__format
tools.description: Format code after fixes

tools.name: mcp__plugin_oh-my-claudecode_t__lsp_hover
tools.description: Inspect type, inferred value, and docs of any expression at file:line:col (dart_hover)

tools.name: mcp__plugin_oh-my-claudecode_t__lsp_goto_definition
tools.description: Jump to declaration of any symbol under analysis (dart_go_to_definition)

use-pattern-matching.description: Validate pattern matching usage with analysis:

tools.name: mcp__plugin_flutter_flutter-ultra-build__analyze
tools.description: Check for exhaustiveness and type errors

tools.name: mcp__plugin_flutter_flutter-ultra-build__fix
tools.description: Apply automated pattern matching migrations
